positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical central composition of an ethereal bioluminescent forest floor. Giant, glowing crystalline flora illuminate the scene with deep sapphire, emerald, and violet tones. Use strong silhouettes for the main structure, making the glowing elements pop against the dark background. The style should be a blend of intricate engraved linework and glowing neon gradient art, designed for high contrast on apparel. Include stylized, oversized mushrooms and glowing root systems. Perfect for a seamless or central chest print. Wallpaper art, mythic flora, glowing vapor, hyperdetailed, vibrant glow, symmetrical.
